name: UX & Product

criteria.name: User Journey Clarity
criteria.description: Are the main user journeys clear, mapped, and free of major friction?

criteria.name: Persona Quality & Documentation
criteria.description: Are personas documented, representative of real users, and actionable?

criteria.name: Ergonomics & Intuitiveness
criteria.description: Can a novice user understand and use the product without assistance?

criteria.name: Design System Coherence
criteria.description: Is there a formal design system and is it consistently applied?

criteria.name: Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 / RGAA)
criteria.description: Is the product compliant with accessibility standards?

criteria.name: User Friction Level
criteria.description: Is friction minimal and recurring pain points addressed? (Note: 5=minimal friction, 1=high recurring friction)

criteria.name: User Feedback Mechanism
criteria.description: Is there a process to collect and act on user feedback?

criteria.name: Responsive & Mobile Experience
criteria.description: Is the product responsive and optimized for mobile devices?

notes: Scale: 1=critical UX issues, 2=significant problems, 3=adequate, 4=good, 5=excellent. For friction: 5=minimal, 1=massive recurring.
